text: Make MCP and voice truly optional in install and runtime flows
description: Ensure the documented and default local startup paths work without MCP tooling or voice integration installed. Optional integrations should have separate setup paths and should not break the core product when absent.

status.comment: Default runtime flow now keeps voice hidden unless explicitly enabled, and the launcher/runtime-config path validates that gating. Remaining open question is the install-side packaging decision for keeping optional packages like mcp and voice-bridge inside the root workspace install set.
